code:
import io
import string

fn hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

mut c0 = 0
mut c1 = 0
mut c2 = 0
mut c3 = 0
mut c4 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut c6 = 0
mut c7 = 0
mut c8 = 0
mut c9 = 0

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
  match b
  when 48
    c0 = c0 + 1
  when 49
    c1 = c1 + 1
  when 50
    c2 = c2 + 1
  when 51
    c3 = c3 + 1
  when 52
    c4 = c4 + 1
  when 53
    c5 = c5 + 1
  when 54
    c6 = c6 + 1
  when 55
    c7 = c7 + 1
  when 56
    c8 = c8 + 1
  when 57
    c9 = c9 + 1
  when _
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("0: #{hashes(c0)}")
print("1: #{hashes(c1)}")
print("2: #{hashes(c2)}")
print("3: #{hashes(c3)}")
print("4: #{hashes(c4)}")
print("5: #{hashes(c5)}")
print("6: #{hashes(c6)}")
print("7: #{hashes(c7)}")
print("8: #{hashes(c8)}")
print("9: #{hashes(c9)}")
